g.text: we are given an array and a window is sliding over it from left to right of length "k"
we have to find the maximum number from each window
We will use a deque (double ended queue) to minimize the time complexity
We will store the indices of the current window in decreasing order
Remove the indices which are out of bound from current window
In every iteration we will do 3 things
- Remove the indices out of bound (i-k+1)
- Remove from last which are at given (index of last) element of window
- Add the current element (current index) into the list
When the iteration reaches at last it will return the result array
